site.title: Banners & Awnings | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom vinyl banners, fence signs & awnings for businesses, events, sports fields & job sites. Durable outdoor signs designed to stand out & last.

hero.title: Banners & Awnings
hero.imageAlt: Custom vinyl banners and awning signage

centreText.title: Durable Signs That Get Seen
centreText.description: Whether you need something temporary or long-term, we produce large format signage that's durable, highly visible & built to promote your business, team, event or project.

features.title: Vinyl Banners, Fence & Site Signage
features.description:
From sports fields to job sites, we create high-quality banners & large format signs that are built for real-world use.

  • Vinyl banners for sales, events & promotions
  • Fence banners for schools, sports fields, soccer fields & baseball diamonds
  • Construction site signage with company branding & job details
  • Mesh banners for windy areas & long fence runs
  • Indoor & outdoor event signage

We customize every detail, including reinforced edges, grommets & custom sizing to suit your space.

features.title: Custom Awnings That Get Seen
features.description:
Awnings do so much more than provide shade! They act as important signage for your business or building, while enhancing your visibility.

  • Showcase your business name & logo
  • Add visibility from the street
  • Provide practical coverage for entrances & windows

Available in a range of styles & materials, our awnings are made to handle Canadian weather while keeping your space looking clean & professional.

features.title: Built For Durability & High Visibility
features.description:
Outdoor signage needs to perform AND get your business or organization noticed! We produce signs that are made to last & designed to be seen from a distance.

  • Location & exposure to weather
  • Short-term vs. long-term use
  • Installation method & mounting surfaces

Want really, REALLY big? We do that too. We'll help you choose the right solution for your space, your message & how your sign will be used.
